advisor_requests.purpose: bind run/session/condition/geometry identity, timestamps, units, and provenance

advisor_requests.item: at least 50 unaveraged flow-off frames per fixed condition
advisor_requests.purpose: estimate detector noise and slow drift under the current engineering gate

advisor_requests.item: camera calibration, pixel/ray mapping, masks, and confidence
advisor_requests.purpose: bind observations to the physical forward model and catch row-order errors

advisor_requests.item: paired f-number or focus conditions on the same optical channel and geometry
advisor_requests.purpose: identify finite-aperture mismatch instead of assigning all residual error to aperture

advisor_requests.item: callable forward/adjoint or JVP/VJP plus a tiny reference case
advisor_requests.purpose: audit adjointness, units, support, and matched solver cost

advisor_requests.item: permanent camera, session, or geometry audit manifest with SHA-256
advisor_requests.purpose: test independent generalization without renaming opened views as fresh

advisor_requests.item: an independent physical endpoint when available
advisor_requests.purpose: separate field or interface accuracy from image-space consistency

advisor_requests.item: separate storage, training, thesis, figure, and public-release permissions
advisor_requests.purpose: keep laboratory data and calibration material out of the public repository

claim_boundary: This is a field-level contract rehearsal, not an N2 dataset record.
The passed B0 operator interface is not a reconstruction or model result.
The public PSU archive has no independent three-dimensional field truth.
Held-out reprojection measures image-space consistency, not unique recovery of the true field.
No algorithm, real-data improvement, generalization, or publication claim is authorized.

dataset_public_facts.name: Open-source BOS tomography dataset of high-speed flow over a flight body

endpoints.heldout_reprojection.reason: Rotation-block active-vector relative L2 is legal image-space evidence when masks stay frozen; it is not unique 3D truth.

field_domain.parameterization_units_and_.reason: The project B0 computational box is not evidence for the measured field variable, units, or physical support.

field_domain.truth_available.reason: The experimental archive has no independent three-dimensional field truth.

forward_model.B0_forward_adjoint.reason: A deterministic nine-support-view B0 forward/adjoint interface passed tracked CPU64 and MPS32 dot-product audits; this is interface evidence only.

forward_model.published_cone_ray_samplin.reason: The paper reports a cone-ray data operator with 8.5% coefficient of variation and 8000 points per pixel; this is a cost motivation, not surrogate evidence.

identity.dataset_id.reason: DOI and dataset title are present in the tracked public protocol.

identity.session_and_acquisition_time.reason: The public summaries do not bind a verifiable acquisition timestamp or session identity.

permissions.reason: Public availability alone does not fill project-specific storage, training, thesis, figure, or redistribution permissions.

physical_mismatch.flow_off_repeats.reason: The paper reports 2000 acquired frames per test, but the tracked archive inventory exposes zero independent temporal repeats per fixed condition; distinct rotations are distinct geometries.

physical_mismatch.primary.reason: Finite aperture, calibration drift, displacement error, and discretization cannot be ranked causally; the reported f/22 and f/32 groups also change lens and camera placement.

sensors.image_shape.reason: All seven rotation-40 camera payloads report one common detector shape.

sensors.optics_and_calibration_rmse.reason: The paper reports lens groups, f-numbers, pixel pitch, and aggregate calibration RMSE, but it does not bind every N2 sensor alias to an optical channel, calibration version, and timestamp.

split_contract.materialized_digest.reason: A policy summary is not the actual member manifest or recomputable split digest used by an N2 run.

split_contract.policy.reason: The public protocol separates three support rotations, one development rotation, and six sealed audit rotations.

views.confidence_and_timestamps.reason: The tracked public summaries do not bind a per-view confidence product or acquisition timestamps.

views.reference_flowon_displacement_mask.reason: The archive inventory lists reference, deflected, displacement, and mask products, but a per-view manifest must bind exact files and checksums locally.

gate_results.reason: Acquisition/session identity and measured field semantics are missing.
Detector shape and selected geometry are known, but per-view confidence and calibration RMSE are not bound.
The B0 nine-view operator audit passed, but no complete N2 dataset record binds it to every view and condition.
The primary mismatch is unknown and independent flow-off repeats per fixed condition are zero.
A 70-view policy exists, but an N2 member manifest and recomputable split digest are not materialized here.
Held-out reprojection is a legal form, but the complete fixed-mask audit contract is not yet bound.
Project-specific storage, training, thesis, and redistribution permissions were not inferred.

operator_interface_rehearsal.reason: An audited support operator is necessary but not sufficient for a bound N2 dataset record.

stop_rules: Do not rerun or enlarge v5y/v6a RayKernel models on opened synthetic rigs.
Do not call 70 camera-rotation views 70 independent temporal repeats.
Do not freeze finite aperture as primary without paired real f-number or focus conditions on one optical channel and geometry.
Do not treat the paper's cross-camera f/22 versus f/32 setup as a clean aperture intervention because lens and placement are confounded.
Do not report field L2, three-dimensional truth, real improvement, or generalization from held-out reprojection alone.
